content:
# {{projectName}} - MongoDB Database Project

This is a MongoDB database project created using MultiTech CLI.

## Project Structure

```
{{projectName}}/
├── data/           # Persistent data storage
├── migrations/     # Database migrations
├── seeds/         # Seed data
├── config/        # Configuration files
├── scripts/       # Utility scripts
├── docker-compose.yml
└── .env
```

## Configuration

The project uses the following environment variables:
- `MONGODB_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME`: Root username
- `MONGODB_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD`: Root password
- `MONGODB_DATABASE`: Database name
- `MONGODB_PORT`: Database port

## Getting Started

1. Review and modify the `.env` file with your desired settings
2. Start the database:
   ```bash
   docker compose up -d
   ```
3. Access the database at localhost:27017

## Connection String

The MongoDB connection string format is:
```
mongodb://<username>:<password>@localhost:27017/<database>
```

## Health Check

The container includes a health check that monitors the database status. You can check the container status using:
```bash
docker compose ps
```

## Best Practices

- Regularly backup your data
- Keep your credentials secure
- Monitor database performance
- Follow MongoDB best practices for indexing and querying
- Use migrations for schema changes
- Implement proper security measures

## Support

For more information about MongoDB, visit:
- [MongoDB Documentation](https://www.mongodb.com/docs/)
- [MongoDB Community](https://www.mongodb.com/community/)
